name: type: bug
description: Broken or incorrect behavior.

name: type: feature
description: New request or improvement idea.

name: type: question
description: Question, clarification, or confusion report.

name: status: backlog
description: Raw report, idea, or issue waiting for review.

name: status: in review
description: Being reviewed, clarified, or checked for priority.

name: status: ready
description: Accepted and ready to work.

name: status: in progress
description: Actively being worked.

name: status: done
description: Resolved, released, declined, or otherwise complete.

name: priority: P0 - BLOCKER
description: Blocks league usage, access, workflows, or data trust.

name: priority: P1 - HIGH
description: Important issue that should be handled soon.

name: priority: P2 - Normal
description: Normal priority feedback or improvement.

name: priority: P3 - LOW
description: Polish, minor cleanup, or nice-to-have.

name: impact: UI
description: Controls, layout, navigation, or interaction problem.

name: impact: Visual
description: Styling, spacing, alignment, color, image, or presentation problem.

name: impact: Speed
description: Slow page, timeout, delayed load, or stuck state.

name: impact: Mobile
description: Phone or small-screen issue.

name: impact: Data/Stats
description: Wrong, missing, stale, or confusing league data.

name: impact: Access/Login
description: Login, permission, visibility, or role access issue.

name: impact: Copy/Content
description: Wording, page text, labels, or instructions.

name: component: Banner
description: Banner, role badges, header identity, or banner assets.

name: component: Owners Directory
description: Owners directory and owner listing surface.

name: component: Salary Dashboard
description: Salary dashboard or salary admin surface.

name: component: League Analytics
description: League analytics, charts, source status, and insights.

name: component: Team Front Office
description: Team Front Office dashboard shell and owner/fan console.

name: component: General/Missing
description: Catch-all for reports that do not map cleanly yet.

name: component: Press Box
description: Team Front Office Press Box section.

name: component: Salary Report
description: Team Front Office Salary Report section.

name: component: Trade Block
description: Team Front Office Trade Block section.

name: component: Roster
description: Team Front Office Roster section.

name: component: Transactions
description: Team Front Office Transactions section.

name: component: Draft Board
description: Team Front Office Draft Board section.

name: component: Alerts
description: Team Front Office Alerts section.

name: component: Backend/Data
description: Backend data, stack, cache, or source issue.

name: component: Identity/Owners
description: Owner identity, profile, avatar, team name, or role mapping.

name: component: Rosters
description: Roster data, roster display, roster ownership, or roster freshness.

name: component: Salary Manager
description: Salary Manager backend, contracts, cap rules, or salary truth.

name: component: League Data
description: League settings, league records, history, or league source data.

name: component: Matchups/Standings
description: Matchups, standings, playoff results, or bracket data.

name: component: Drafts/Picks
description: Draft board, draft picks, traded picks, or draft data.

name: component: Calendar/Scoring
description: Fantasy calendar, scoring state, week state, or scoring timing.
